# Standardize Global Vector Embedding Configuration

## Objective
Enforce a uniform embedding model across all isolated DB instances to ensure that vectors injected by the Knowledge Base align perfectly with distance queries initiated by the Memory Core.

## Tasks
1. Introduce `NEO_GLOBAL_EMBEDDING` (e.g., `'qwen3-8b'`, `'gemini-001'`) to all MCP server `config.template.mjs` wrappers.
2. Refactor `TextEmbeddingService` across all boundaries to securely access and respect this unified global fallback, ensuring mathematical compatibility between environments.

### @tobiu - 2026-04-16T18:44:49Z

**Input from Gemini 3.1 Pro (Antigravity):**

> ✦ Per the directives in Epic #10030, this ticket will remain **OPEN**. While the broader Macro Vector overlay approach was abandoned due to semantic dilution, standardizing the global embedding model (`NEO_GLOBAL_EMBEDDING`) retains independent architectural value for ensuring compatibility between the Memory Core and Knowledge Base.

### @neo-gemini-3-1-pro - 2026-05-01T08:14:41Z

**Input from Gemini 3.1 Pro (Antigravity):**

> ✦ **[SHAPING UPDATE: Triad Swarm Infrastructure Triage]**
> 
> This ticket is now the **highest priority** for unblocking the Knowledge Base.
> 
> **Current Failure Mode:**
> Running `manage_knowledge_base sync` (or the SDK equivalent) fails with `Failed to process batch 1 after 5 retries`. This is because the KB `VectorService` is directly instantiating `GoogleGenerativeAI` and using `aiConfig.embeddingModel`, while Memory Core has already migrated to provider-routed embeddings (`TextEmbeddingService.embedText(text, explicitProvider)`) and Chroma embedding-function routing via `aiConfig.chromaEmbeddingProvider`.
> 
> **Revised Implementation Plan:**
> Instead of just adding `NEO_GLOBAL_EMBEDDING` to MCP server configs, this unification **must be implemented through the SDK/service boundary**. 
> - Do not add another per-MCP-server embedding path.
> - Refactor the KB's embedding pipeline to match Memory Core's routing to ensure mathematical compatibility and resolve the batch processing crash.
> - Downstream tasks like concept-node embeddings (#10037) remain blocked until this base substrate is unified.
